title: Unisys India Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Unisys India Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Unisys India Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Unisys India Holdings Services:
Unisys India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unisys India Holdings Services!
